name: security-audit
description: Security suite for Claude Code (6 composable skills): pre-install dependency audits, secrets scanning, hook auditing, permissions auditing, egress gating, and periodic dependency rescans. Catches typosquats, fresh malware drops, maintainer takeovers, hardcoded credentials, exfiltration hooks, overly broad allow-rules, unauthorized outbound transmissions, and CVEs published after install. All skills share one architecture: PASS/WARN/FAIL verdicts, 0-100 risk scoring, structured JSON reports, manual whitelists, and append-only handoff logging.
